title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
